name: Chuy Region (Kyrgyzstan)

colors.symbolism: drawn from the Kyrgyz national flag — courage and valour

description: A red field charged centrally with the regional emblem of Chuy — depicting the Tian Shan mountains, the Chuy Valley, and a sun.
history: Chuy Region surrounds the Kyrgyz capital Bishkek and is one of the seven regions of Kyrgyzstan. The regional flag combines the red field of the Kyrgyz national flag with the local emblem.

features.symbolism: the Tian Shan mountains and the agricultural Chuy Valley
